title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARIAT OF THE PUBLIC FUNCTION
description: Circular by which the dependencies and entities of the Federal Public Administration, the Attorney General's Office, as well as the governments of the federal entities, municipalities and mayors of Mexico City, are informed that they mustrefrain from accepting proposals or entering into contracts with the company Distribuidora Sajor, S.A. de C.V. and the natural person who legally represented it, the citizen María Aurora Rubio Hernández, even when the latter intends to represent companiesother than the sanctioned party.

title: EXECUTIVE BRANCH MINISTRY OF HEALTH
description: Coordination Agreement for the exercise of powers in health control and promotion, entered into by the Ministry of Health, with the participation of the Federal Commission for Protection against Health Risks, and the State of Sonora.
